reviews.review_description:
Total mess to use. 
Nice Animals but have never seen such a confusing and bad interface.
Uninstalled after only 15 min use.
Save your money.
Very disappointed. Very glitchy.  Really needs a new menu set up as well.

developer_response.body: Sorry it did not meet your expectations.  Ongoing updates are being made based on any feedback

reviews.review_description: If you could update the table top small animals to allow players to remove the 2 platforms they spawn with or at least resize them/move them independently of each other it would be perfect. My nephew loves playing with the small animals, but the platforms he doesn't care for and they tend to be intrusive for his visibility of the space he's playing in. Playing in mixed reality and having 2 giant platforms blocking your visibility can be annoying. Or allow us to move the platforms without moving the animals simultaneously. Thanks!

developer_response.body: Hello a new update just went live and an area has been added where you can now hide the tables, thanks to this post :) . Additionally added a bonus jungle home area and various levels have added features including animal position save state and custom mixed reality visual boundaries.

reviews.review_description: The fish look real! I wish everyone who has doubts on the QuestPro could try this. This is a showcase game in my opinion for the first Pro.  Hiding the fish around the house and then handing off the headset for a sort of scavenger hunt is a great use for this as well.  Very immersive game with the hand and finger tracking as well.

developer_response.body: I am glad you enjoyed it!

reviews.review_title: Sea Creatures Swimming In My VR Room
reviews.review_description:
Ocean Passthrough is an amazing under the sea adventure, inside your home. With the use of AR / mix reality, you can bring over 100 different sea creatures into your home. Your home will become the ocean. The game has everything from turtles, sharks, crocodiles and even extinct dinosaur fish. You can build the life size aquarium of your dreams.

The game comes with 10 built in scenes. From chilling with turtles, to feeding sharks, there are a lot of things to explore and do. My favorite is starting in an empty world and making your own ocean scene. Its just a joy watching fish swim around you with the relaxing music. The game uses hand tracking as well, so no controllers are needed. You can use room scaling to walk around your ocean world you create, or if you want to play stationary, use the control sticks to move the world around you. You do not need a large space to enjoy this game.

The graphics and animations of the sea creatures is stunning. A lot of detail went into every model. Your home will become an immersive fish aquarium. With over 100 creatures to pick from, you have so many ocean scenes you can create. With that said, the creature spawn system is random, and can take some time to go through. I would like to see a drop down menu, with the creatures in categories for easier selection. Another cool feature to add would be the ability to scale the size of each creature.

Over all this game is great. I always wanted a big fish tank filled with exotic fish, but am to lazy to maintain it lol. With this my entire VR room became my dream aquarium, with no clean up. I like just sitting on my floor watching the fish swim by. It is a fun relaxing world you can create. If you enjoy ocean life and love AR, mix reality this is a title to add to your collection. There is just so many possibilities of scenes to make. Bring home the ocean adventure with Ocean Passthrough.

Watch my preview here,
https://youtu.be/S7XQS7hPVKk

Another lovely demonstration for a super immersive experience. Swimming and feeding sharks at home. I like taking and placing octupus with hands. And it's only the beginning, waiting for more and more. Great app.

This is a steal for only 49p.   Worth 5 stars for the price !!!! 

Graphics excellent. Fish dinosaurs animals can be held  love the mixed reality of the sharks. Surrounding you. Give it a go for the silly price
I love the use of the passthrough here. Animals of all sizes really offer a great visual experience. I highly recommend it!!!
Good fun to play with fish with my hands in my room or visit teh beach inside the game.  holding them with just hands and no controller was great
Really poor textures, models themselves are decent. It's not doing much for me.
Loved the turtles and interacting with the animals with my hands! Good animal experience for what it is.
I enjoy being able to interact with all of the animals.
